author: jellydnes
content:
Hi all,
I'm curious what people are using for long-running bootnode clients to help peer private networks. 
I noticed ethapndaops has [bootnodoor](https://github.com/ethpandaops/bootnodoor) however it doesn't look like a release has been cut in half a year, is this actively recommended?
Geth used to package a bootnode implementation in client:go-alltools, but that seemed to be dropped around version 1.14.
Are their any other tools teams are using for strictly bootnodes?
